title: Special Tactics trooper
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Tarkin_Paramilitary_Troops.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Special Tactics troopers lent to the ORSF are attacked on the surface of [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]].]]

'''Special Tactics troopers''' or '''Special Missions troops''' were [[Special forces/Legends|special forces]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]].<ref name="EGtW-E4" /> They wore uniforms and were armed with [[A280 blaster rifle/Legends|A280 blaster rifles]].<ref name="RP">''[[Rogue Planet]]''</ref> [[Battalion/Legends|Battalions]] of [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] supported the [[Outland Regions Security Force/Legends|Outland Regions Security Force]] during the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]].

==History==
[[File:Mount_Avos.jpg|thumb|left|325px|Republic forces near Mount Avos during the Stark Hyperspace War.]]In [[54 BBY/Legends|54 BBY]], [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Ranulph Tarkin/Legends|Ranulph Tarkin]], creator of the [[Outland Regions Security Force/Legends|Outland Regions Security Force]], was extremely worried of the Republic's lack of preparedness for potential significant military threats. Many Judicial Forces agreed with Tarkin and privately hoped that he would win his legal battle with their weakened department. After Tarkin won appointments to several key committees and became the head of the [[Militarists/Legends|Militarist]] movement of the Republic, he started the [[First Battle of Qotile]] in order to expose the weakness of the Republic and emerge victorious over the [[Stark Commercial Combine]]. Sympathetic Judicials lent him full battalions of Special Missions assault troops to provide a ground assault force for the conflict.<ref name="The Essential Guide to Warfare">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

[[File:Shw-battle.jpg|thumb|250px|Special Tactics troopers and Jedi hold off Combine forces.]]During the First Battle of Qotile, two-thirds of the ORSF [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] simply disappeared after jumping into hyperspace due to the [[Tionese program]] virus. The rest were trounced by the Combine fleet and the survivors evacuated to the surface of [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]]. There, the Militarists' favors turned. Special Tactics troopers rescued Senator [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Valorum]] and his [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] escorts, then dug in beneath [[Mount Avos]]. They fought several battles on the planet and held off the Combine's mercenary forces with [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web]] fire and [[PLX-1/Legends|PLEX]] missiles. A small force of Judicials and Jedi were able to escape with Valorum and eventually the siege was lifted with the [[Stark Commercial Combine|Stark Collective's]] defeat in the [[Fifth Battle of Qotile]].<ref name="The Essential Guide to Warfare">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref><ref name="SWR:TSHW">''[[Star Wars: The Stark Hyperspace War]]''</ref>

[[File:Story_4.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Laslo Dorits]] speaking for the [[Stark Veteran Assembly]].]]In [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]], Special Tactics troopers accompanied [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] of the ORSF to the [[Gardaji Rift/Legends|Gardaji Rift]] and participated in the [[Second Battle of Zonama Sekot]].<ref name="RP">''[[Rogue Planet]]''</ref>

Republic soldiers who fought in the Stark Hyperspace War later formed the [[Stark Veteran Assembly]]. One member, [[Laslo Dorits]], criticized Senator Padmé Amidala for statements she made during a [[Peace Rally on Commenor]] in [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]].<ref name="Hnn">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|45|news/13228_4.html|Stark Veterans Blast Amidala}}</ref> The Special Tactics troopers were the predecessors of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Army Special Missions trooper/Legends|Special Missions troopers]].<ref name="EGtW-E4">{{Tumblr|subdomain=jasonfry|url=post/21728447315/eg-to-warfare-endnotes-pt-4|name=Jason Fry's Dorkery|text=EG to Warfare: Endnotes Pt. 4}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Republic-affiliated troopers that appeared in the [[2001]] comic arc [[Star Wars: The Stark Hyperspace War|''The Stark Hyperspace War'']] were [[Retroactive continuity|retcon]]ed by ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' as being the Special Tactics troopers from the ''[[Rogue Planet]]'' novel.<ref name="EGtW-E4" />
